Title: DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_DEL
Description: Removes the setting of permissions of an user named uname on a given graph.

This function removes the setting of permissions of user named uname on graph specified by 
    	graph_iri. As the result, the permission of "nobody",is used for the specified user, the future 
    	changes in permissions of "nobody" will change the access control for the user on the graph in 
    	question.

The function works for disabled or DAV users as well as for active SQL users, so a user can 
    	be banned first and then restricted in RDF access right or visa versa.

Unlike DB.DBA.RDF_DEFAULT_USER_PERMS_DEL , 
    the procedure will not signal an error if called for "nobody" or "dba" users.
